message:
feat(fcp-store): add zone-level SLO metrics to repair planner

Introduce RepairSloMetrics with deterministic nearest-rank percentile
calculation for per-zone coverage health computed during each repair
planning cycle.

- Track coverage_p50/p90/p99 over all objects in the zone plus
  hot_object_access_bps measuring reconstructable hot object ratio.
- Wire metric collection into RepairController::plan_zone() so every
  RepairPlan now carries an slo_metrics field.
- Add unit tests for percentile math, default/serde roundtrip, cost
  estimate monotonicity, and planner integration asserting expected
  percentile values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
